# spacelift_idp_group_mapping (Data Source)

`spacelift_idp_group_mapping` represents a data source for retrieving information about an existing IdP group mapping in Spacelift.



<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `name` (String) Name of the IdP group as defined in the SSO provider

### Read-Only

- `description` (String) Description of the IdP group mapping
- `id` (String) The ID of this resource.
- `policy` (Set of Object, Deprecated) List of access rules for the IdP group. (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--policy))

<a id="nestedatt--policy"></a>
### Nested Schema for `policy`

Read-Only:

- `role` (String)
- `space_id` (String)
